visual_description: In a dark, nighttime setting, a person in a dark jacket is seen from the side, holding a long object that emits a bright, white light and sparks, illuminating the immediate area. The background is almost entirely black, with a faint, smoky haze. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in a white, stylized font. The camera is shaky, suggesting a chaotic or action-packed moment. The audio is filled with the sounds of a chaotic and violent confrontation. A man shouts in a loud, aggressive, and commanding voice, "站住!" (Stop!). His tone is filled with urgency and authority, as if he is a law enforcement officer trying to apprehend someone. The camera cuts to a blurry, shaky shot of several figures in dark clothing moving quickly through a dark, outdoor environment. The figures are indistinct due to the rapid motion and low light. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The camera angle shifts to a low, ground-level view. A person in dark clothing is on the ground, being pushed or pulled by other figures who are mostly out of frame. The ground appears to be muddy or uneven. The "风行网" text is still present
